title: epipactis royleana
intro: Epipactis royleana, also known as the Himalayan helleborine, is a species of orchid native to the Himalayan region. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Epipactis royleana include its potential to alleviate respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to act as an antiseptic and anti-inflammatory agent. In traditional herbal preparations, Epipactis royleana is often used in the form of infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
